title: VandalBricks GUI
description: Makes the game interface vandal-style.Brick textures, overgrown walls, graffiti, garbage.
body:
# **Content**
- **All block interfaces**
- **Survival HUD**
- **Villager trading**
- **Horse GUI**
- **Creative interface**
